scope.title: 1. Scope
paragraphs: These Terms and Conditions (T&C) apply to all agreements between alpina GmbH (hereinafter the "Provider") and the users (hereinafter the "Customers") of the alpina platform.
The platform provides data-driven analysis and decision support for businesses. By registering or using the services, customers accept these Terms and Conditions as binding.

description.title: 2. Description of Services
description.intro: alpina provides a cloud-based platform with the following features:
items: Integration of data from multiple sources
description.outro: The specific scope of services depends on the selected service package.

registration.title: 3. Registration and User Account
paragraphs: Registration is required to use the platform. The customer agrees to provide accurate and complete information.

The customer is responsible for the security of their access credentials and must report any unauthorized use immediately. The provider is entitled to temporarily suspend accounts if misuse is suspected.

termination.title: 4. Contract Duration and Termination
paragraphs: The contract duration depends on the selected billing model (monthly or yearly).
Termination periods:
items: Monthly contracts: 30 days before the end of the month
Annual contracts: 90 days before the end of the contract
termination.outro: The right to terminate without notice for good cause remains unaffected for both parties.

cancellation.title: 5. Right to Cancel at Any Time
paragraphs: The customer has the right to cancel the contract at any time without observing a notice period.
Upon cancellation, the customer's payment obligation is suspended from the time of cancellation. Payments already made for the current billing period will be refunded proportionally.
This rule applies to all contract types and billing models. The customer is not required to provide a reason for cancellation and no additional fees will be charged.

Cancellation may be submitted in writing by email to rysermariano@gmail.com or through the customer portal. After cancellation, the customer will continue to have access to their data for a period of 30 days in order to export it.

payment.title: 6. Prices and Payment
paragraphs: All prices are stated in euros plus the applicable statutory value-added tax. Invoices are issued electronically and must be paid within 14 days.
In the event of late payment, the provider reserves the right to restrict or temporarily suspend access to the platform.

privacy.title: 7. Data Protection and Security
paragraphs: The provider commits to complying with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and all applicable data protection laws.
Customer data is stored in secure data centers within Germany. Further details are governed by the separate privacy policy.

warranty.title: 8. Warranty and Liability
paragraphs: The provider ensures the contractual operation of the platform and aims for an average monthly availability of 99.5%.
The provider’s liability is limited to intent and gross negligence. In cases of slight negligence, the provider is only liable for the breach of essential contractual obligations.

intellectual.title: 9. Intellectual Property
paragraphs: All rights to the platform, including software, algorithms and documentation, remain with the provider.
The customer receives a simple, non-transferable right of use for the duration of the contract.

final.title: 10. Final Provisions
paragraphs: German law applies, excluding the UN Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods. The place of jurisdiction is the provider’s registered office.
Changes to these Terms and Conditions will be communicated to customers at least 30 days before they take effect. An objection entitles the customer to ordinary termination.
